ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 505

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Jul-19-23 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 505

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for order of examination of Satish Ambati.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:11:07 p.m. and concluding at 02:25:40 p.m.

Plaintiff/Creditor Charles Slinguff appearing represented by Michael A. Mazzocone, Esq.
Defendant/Debtor Satish Ambati appearing in pro per.

SATISH AMBATI is placed under oath and examined.

After brief examination, Debtor refuses to answer questions propounded by Creditor's Counsel.
Parties request Court intervention.

Court finds the following:

1. This case was filed on Sep-03-2021
2. Defendant/Debtor was personally served on Oct-23-2021
3. Default against Defendant/Debtor was entered on Jan-25-2022
4. Default Judgment was entered on Jun-30-2022

Judgment has been entered. Debtor can investigate remedies to appeal/vacate the judgment.

On Mar-24-2023, the parties agreed that Debtor would respond to Creditor's request for interragatories by Apr-05-2023. Court orders Debtor to answer all questions propounded by close of business (5:00 p.m.) on Jun-20-2023. Court further orders matter continued to June-21-2023 for compliance. If Debtor has not answered all questions, the Court shall hold him in contempt.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Continued For Letter To May-17-23 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for order of examination.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not Recorded

Plaintiff Charles Slingluff appearing represented by Michael Mazzocone, Esq.
Defendant Satish Ambati appearing in pro per.

Defendant's request for continuance is GRANTED pursuant to the agrrement of the parties.

Order of Examination is continued to May-17-2023 at 2:00 p.m. in Dept. 505. Bench Warrant Letter issued to ensure the appearance of Defendant.

Clerk to send notice.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Satish Ambati, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18 a.m.

Michael A. Mazzocone, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Charles Slingluff, an individual, who was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Mazocone and Slingluff appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Satish Ambati, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Oral Contract was filed on September 23, 2021, and personally served on defendant Satish Ambati on October 23, 2021.
Default as to defendant Satish Ambati was entered on January 25, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 29, 2022.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Charles Slingluff, an individual, and against the defaulted defendant Satish Ambati, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,694.91.
Costs - $651.01.

Total - $43,345.92.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 10:28 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
